schema.appDescription: Calculate returns from a sweep-in FD linked to your savings account. Earn FD rates while maintaining savings liquidity.

howToSteps.name: Enter your details
howToSteps.text: Fill in the input fields for the Sweep-In FD Calculator. All inputs have smart defaults.

howToSteps.name: View instant results
howToSteps.text: Results update in real time as you type — no submit button needed.

howToSteps.name: Explore breakdown
howToSteps.text: Open the year-by-year breakdown table to see how your numbers change over time.

howToSteps.name: Compare scenarios
howToSteps.text: Adjust the inputs to compare different scenarios and find the best option for your situation.

faq.q: How accurate is the Sweep-In FD Calculator?
faq.a: The Sweep-In FD Calculator uses standard financial formulas. Results are indicative; actual figures depend on your lender or financial institution's policies.

faq.q: Is the Sweep-In FD Calculator free to use?
faq.a: Yes, the Sweep-In FD Calculator on CalcPhi is completely free with no registration required.
No. All calculations happen in your browser. We do not store any of your financial data.

faq.q: How often are the Sweep-In FD Calculator rates updated?
faq.a: Rates in examples are updated periodically to reflect current market conditions. Always verify with your bank or advisor.

faq.q: Can I use the Sweep-In FD Calculator on mobile?
faq.a: Yes. CalcPhi is fully mobile-optimised. The calculator works on all modern smartphones and tablets.
Anyone in India planning their finances can benefit from the Sweep-In FD Calculator. It's designed for both beginners and experienced investors.

examples.heading: ₹1 lakh deposit at 7% for 3 years (quarterly compounding)
examples.text: Investing ₹1 lakh at 7% p.a. with quarterly compounding for 3 years yields ₹1,23,144. Effective annual yield is 7.19% — slightly higher than the nominal rate due to quarterly compounding.

examples.heading: ₹5 lakh deposit for 5 years — FD vs RD
examples.text: A ₹5 lakh FD at 7.1% for 5 years grows to approximately ₹7,08,867 (quarterly). Contrast with an RD of ₹8,333/month for 5 years at 7.1% — total deposited ₹5 lakh, maturity ₹5,99,714.
